prose.en: When transferring information between different security domains, modify non-releasable information by implementing {param:ac-04.23_odp}.

guidance.en: Modifying non-releasable information can help prevent a data spill or attack when information is transferred across security domains. Modification actions include masking, permutation, alteration, removal, or redaction.

prose.en: when transferring information between security domains, non-releasable information is modified by implementing {param:ac-04.23_odp}.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel with information flow enforcement responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms implementing information flow enforcement functions

guidelines.en: modification action implemented on non-releasable information is defined;
